description: Symbol -> yfinance ticker resolution. Use when NSE symbol doesn't match yfinance, or when corporate actions changed the ticker.

exclude_reasons.TATAMOTORS: Demerged 2024 into TATAMOTORS-PV / TATAMOTORS-CV; base ticker no longer trades
exclude_reasons.LTIM: Possibly delisted on yfinance; manual check needed
exclude_reasons.CANFIN: yfinance unable to resolve; may need exact symbol with suffix
